I-276 East to close, from Sunday, April 19 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take I-76 East to Route I-476 North. This will bring you to the Mid-County Interchange (20).
Detour Information
Take I-76 East to Route I-476 North. This will bring you to the Mid-County Interchange (20).
Ramp from Atwater Dr to I-76
Ramp from Atwater Dr to I-76 closed because of a ramp closure. Ramp closure in effect today until Friday, April 17 at 4:00 pm.

I-76 West to close, from Sunday, April 19 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take US 30 East (4.6 miles) to PA Toll 66 North (7 miles) to US 22 West (10.5 miles). This will bring you to the Pittsburgh Interchange (57). Re-enter PA Turnpike at the Pittsburgh Interchange (57). Follows signs to Ohio and West
Detour Information
